news.t: Advisors and Investors Now Have an America-First Means of Accessing China With the Launch of the Core Values Alpha Greater China Growth ETF (CGRO)

holdings.infoBox: CGRO is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tencent Holdings stock at 8.93%, Alibaba Group Holding at 8.04%, Luckin Coffee at 5.66%, Ubtech Robotics Corp at 5.26%, and Xiaomi at 5.11%.

overview.description: The CoreValues Alpha Greater China Growth ETF (CGRO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by actively investing in 30 to 40 Chinese companies operating in high-growth sectors. The portfolio is constructed using core values approach that considers US national security, American values, and national interests. CGRO was launched on Oct 16, 2023 and is issued by CoreValues Alpha.

data.title: PDD, CGRO: U.S. vs China Stocks
data.text: PDD Holdings (PDD) hit a new 3-year high today. Ben Harburg discusses this, as well as the expectations for Chinese equities.

data.title: Advisors and Investors Now Have an America-First Means of Accessing China With the Launch of the Core Values Alpha Greater China Growth ETF (CGRO)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Core Values Alpha launches CGRO. Active ETF provides exposure to China growth story without compromising U.S. security, values or economic leadership.
